name: code-review-agent-denied-replay-eval
summary: Deterministic replay-readiness eval failed for the denied tool-call path: the permission packet denied the write attempt and no replay state exists for deterministic reconstruction.

checks.summary: The OPA-backed permission packet denied the attempted diff write.
The denied tool call has no generated SQLite replay state.
The trace records replay state as blocking evidence loss.

claim_boundary: This eval is a deterministic local replay-readiness check over a synthetic denied path. It is not a benchmark, model-quality claim, safety certification, or production monitoring result.
